ham.subject: Flipkart Order Confirmation – Order #1234567890
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! We are pleased to confirm your order details below:

Order Number: 1234567890
Order Date: 08-Apr-2026

Items:
1. **Sunglasses – Polarized UV Protection** – Qty: 1 – ₹1,200
2. **Stainless Steel Water Bottle (1L)** – Qty: 2 – ₹800 each
3. **Premium Leather Wallet** – Qty: 1 – ₹2,500

Total Payable: ₹5,300 (incl. GST & delivery charges)

Your order is now *Processing* and will be dispatched within 24 hours. The estimated delivery date is **12-Apr-2026**.

If you have any questions or need to modify your delivery address, please reply to this email or contact our customer care at 1800-123-5432.

Thank you for choosing Flipkart!

Best Regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

*This is an automated message. Please do not reply.*

spam.subject: URGENT: Payroll Update - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an urgent notification from the HR & Finance Department regarding your payroll details for the upcoming month. Our records indicate that there is a discrepancy in the bank account information on file, which might delay your salary disbursement.

**Action Required:**
1. Click the link below to verify and update your banking details.
2. Complete the mandatory confirmation within 24 hours to avoid any delay.

<URL>

Please treat this email as confidential. If you do not take action, your salary for May 2026 may be postponed.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

Rajesh Kumar
HR Manager
ABC Pvt. Ltd.
HR@abc.com
Phone: +91-9876543210
